---
title: "Anne Norgate"
---

## Anne Norgate

**Dates:** (1876-1896)

### Biography

She was the daughter of William Norgate (b. Tichbourne Hants 1832/3), agricultural labourer. She is listed as blind in the 1891 census.

### Letters

- Letter from [November 1896]
- Letter from April 13th 1896
- Letter from April 29th 1893   
- Letter from [November 1890]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
